description_long: This object is a cluster of modern, multi-story residential houses arranged closely together, resembling an urban neighborhood block. The buildings feature flat and slightly angled roofs, with rooftop terraces and open railings, suggesting communal or private outdoor spaces. The facades are a mix of neutral tones, with large rectangular windows and balconies, providing ample natural light and ventilation. The ground level includes landscaped areas with rows of shrubs and small trees, as well as paved walkways and driveways. Several smaller outbuildings and garages are present, adding functional diversity to the property. The overall design is utilitarian yet contemporary, with a focus on maximizing space and outdoor accessibility.
description: A group of modern, multi-story houses with flat and angled roofs, rooftop terraces, and landscaped surroundings, arranged in a compact urban block.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facades, rooftop terraces, balconies, and landscaped entryways with shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the buildings, the arrangement of outbuildings, and the linear landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facades, multiple balconies, and the flat/angled roof structures.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the alignment of houses, rear landscaping, and the spatial relationship between main and outbuildings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows and balconies
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature simple doors, some with small steps or porches, and are flanked by landscaped shrubs and paved paths.
